description_long: This is a white slip-on sneaker with a low back, resembling a mule-style shoe. The upper is made of smooth synthetic or canvas material, featuring a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces and metal eyelets. The sole is thick and flat, constructed from white rubber with a black horizontal stripe running along the side and a textured toe bumper. The interior is open at the heel, making it easy to slide the foot in and out. The overall design is minimalistic and clean, with no visible branding except for a small triangular mark near the tongue.
description: A white mule-style sneaker with a low back, standard laces, and a thick rubber sole with a black stripe. The design is minimal and clean, suitable for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the low back, white laces, black side stripe, and textured toe bumper.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, symmetrical lacing, and clean upper surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same low back, laces, and black stripe, with visible eyelets.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open heel and the interior footbed, emphasizing the slip-on design.
